title: epidendrum rostrigerum
intro: Epidendrum rostrigerum, also known as the rostrigerum orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Epidendrum genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum rostrigerum include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum rostrigerum are typically made by boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water, which can be used to treat various ailments.
